1.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and CPO escalation for budgets exceeding $5,400,000 in USD

3.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and escalate to Head of Strategic Sourcing for budgets between 540,000 and 5,400,000 USD

5.rule_description: Sets minimum supplier quotes and Head of Category escalation for USD budgets between 108,000 and 540,000

6.rule_description: Escalate to Procurement Manager for USD budgets between 27,000 and 108,000

7.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes to 2 for USD budgets between 27,000 and 108,000

8.rule_description: Sets single quote requirement for USD budgets up to 27,000

9.rule_description: Escalate to CPO for contracts exceeding CHF 5,000,000

10.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and escalate to CPO for high-value contracts in CHF currency

11.rule_description: Escalate to Head of Strategic Sourcing for mid-to-high value contracts in CHF currency.

12.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and escalation to Head of Strategic Sourcing for mid-to-high value contracts in CHF currency.

14.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes and escalation to Head of Category for mid-value thresholds in CHF currency

15.rule_description: Escalate to Procurement Manager for mid-value thresholds in CHF currency

16.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes to 2 for mid-value thresholds in CHF currency

17.rule_description: Sets minimum supplier quotes to 1 for budgets between 0 and 24,999.99 CHF.

18.rule_description: Escalate to CPO for budgets >= 5,000,000 EUR.

19.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes to 3 for budgets >= 5,000,000 EUR and escalate to CPO for approval.

20.rule_description: Escalate to Head of Strategic Sourcing for budgets between 500,000 and 4,999,999.99 EUR

21.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes to 3 for budgets between 500,000 and 4,999,999.99 EUR

22.rule_description: Escalate to Head of Category for budgets between 100,000 and 499,999.99 EUR

23.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes to 3 for budgets between 100,000 and 499,999.99 EUR

24.rule_description: Escalate to Procurement Manager for mid-value thresholds in EUR

25.rule_description: Set minimum supplier quotes to 2 for mid-value thresholds in EUR

26.rule_description: Sets the minimum number of supplier quotes to 1 for requests with a budget between 0 and 24,999.99 EUR.
